name: Khabarovsk Krai (Russia)

colors.symbolism: purity, kindness, modesty, a cloudless peaceful sky, and the purity of thoughts of the inhabitants
hope, joy, abundance, the unique flora and fauna of Khabarovsk Krai, and the endless sea of taiga
beauty, gentleness, grandeur, and the vast water resources of Khabarovsk Krai

description: A field divided per pall (three regions meeting at a point on the horizontal meridian): a white triangle above, a light-blue triangle below, and a green isoceles triangle along the hoist.

features.symbolism: the field is divided per pall into three triangles — white above for the snows of the northern reaches and a peaceful sky, light blue below for the vast water resources, and a green hoist triangle for the unique flora and fauna and the endless sea of taiga
